expected_result: Purchase requisition auto-rejected by BPMS015 due to missing peg/GI info. Rejection email received.
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-TOOL. Input quantity, price, receipt date, business partner, but leave pegging information (Project and Activity) fields blank.
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
BPMS015 performs auto-rejection check. Requisition is auto-rejected due to missing Peg/GI information -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to PEG/GI info missing -> Rejection email received with reason

summary: Subcontracted Requisition: Blank BP or Employee Supplier
expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review by BPMS015 due to blank BP. Rejection email received.
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-VALVE. Input quantity, price, receipt date, but leave Business Partner field blank.
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed.
BPMS015 performs validation check after buyer review. Requisition is rejected due to blank Business Partner -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to blank BP -> Rejection email received with reason

summary: Subcontracted Requisition: SubConDefault Items Not Linked to Production Orders
expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review by BPMS015 due to unlinked production order. Rejection email received.
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line with SubConDefault item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-DEFAULT-01. Input quantity, price, receipt date, business partner, pegging info.
Ensure no corresponding production order exists in tisfc0501m000 for this subcontracted item.
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed.
BPMS015 performs validation check after buyer review. Requisition is rejected because SubConDefault item is not linked to a production order -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to unlinked production order -> Rejection email received with reason

expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review by BPMS015 due to multi-line subcontracted items. Rejection email received.
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create first line with standard cost item ZZZCST. Input quantity, price, receipt date, business partner, pegging info.
Add second line with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-PIPE. Input quantity, price, receipt date, business partner, pegging info.
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed.
BPMS015 performs validation check after buyer review. Requisition is rejected because it contains multiple lines with subcontracted items -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to multi-line subcontracted items -> Rejection email received with reason

summary: Standard Cost Purchase Requisition - 137 PO Conversion
expected_result: Cost purchase requisition approved and converted to 137 series PO successfully
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.
Create new requisition line. Input cost item (ZZZCST), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, pegging information (Project and Activity). Save -> Requisition line created
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval
Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions -> BPMS015 case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved -> PRQ status is Approved
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next -> BWQ case created
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next -> Transfer initiated
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining -> BWQ case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted. Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000) -> PRQ converted. 137 PO number displayed
Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval -> PO submitted for approval
Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC -> PO is approved

summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition - Valid Flow with Production Order Link
expected_result: Valid subcontracted purchase requisition approved and converted to 197 series PO successfully
steps: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new.

Create production order in tisfc0501m000. Maintain header details (warehouse, routing, dates). Add line with project/activity. Planning Line tab add task '341AR'. Actions > Subcontracting > Generate Subcontracting Documents -> Production order created
Find generated PRQ in tdpur2501m000. Maintain PRQ: Add Buyer, Purchase office POPS01. Submit -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval
Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions -> BPMS015 case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved -> PRQ status is Approved
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next -> BWQ case created
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next -> Transfer initiated
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining -> BWQ case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted. Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000) -> PRQ converted. 197 PO number displayed
Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval -> PO submitted for approval
Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC -> PO is approved
